name: insurance brokers managing 10-20 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, missed renewals cause lost revenue. We provide timely alerts for renewals instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking policy renewals and identifying cross-selling opportunities.
